mapper.update:
update testinfotable
test_id = #{test_id},
test_time = #{test_time},
regist_start_time = #{regist_start_time},
regist_end_time = #{regist_end_time},
tprice = #{tprice},
where testinfo_id = #{testinfo_id}
mapper.select:
select * from testinfotable,testtable where ""="" and testinfotable.test_id=testtable.test_id
and concat(testinfo_id) like concat('%',#{testinfo_id},'%')
and concat(tname) like concat('%',#{tname},'%')
and concat(tsubject) like concat('%',#{tsubject},'%')
and concat(torganizer) like concat('%',#{torganizer},'%')
and concat(status) like concat('%',#{status},'%')
